---
title: "FRESH Insights"
subtitle: "Notes on nutrition measurement, dietary surveys, and what the headline numbers miss."
listing:
  contents:
    - "*/index.qmd"
    - "!resources/index.qmd"
    - "!same-bread-five-verdicts/index.qmd"   # superseded by meta-nps-five-verdicts (Part 1); page stays live, just off the index
  template: _listing-cards.ejs.md
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [title, subtitle, date, reading-time, categories, fresh-engines, topics, series, part, card-subtitle, companion]
  date-format: "MMM D, YYYY"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
page-layout: full
---

Notes from **FRESH** on how we measure nutrition and health. We start by
reproducing the canonical numbers, then push past them to the resolution, the
choices, and the gaps the headline figures quietly hide.

```{=html}
<div class="fi-legend">
  <span class="fi-legend-label">How pieces are tagged:</span>
  <span class="fi-chip fi-chip--engine eng-metanps">Engine</span>
  <span>the FRESH tool behind it</span>
  <span class="fi-chip fi-chip--topic">Topic</span>
  <span>the question it asks</span>
</div>
```
